seoTitle: Turkey Beach vs Turrawulla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turkey Beach and Turrawulla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turkey Beach vs Turrawulla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turkey Beach and Turrawulla.
heading: Turkey Beach vs Turrawulla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turkey Beach, Queensland and Turrawulla, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turkey Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Turrawulla (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turkey Beach or Turrawulla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turkey Beach has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Turrawulla scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turkey Beach scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Turrawulla scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turkey Beach or Turrawulla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turkey Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
